title: The symplectic structure of curves in three dimensional spaces of   constant curvature and the equations of mathematical physics
summary:
This paper defines a symplectic form on the infinite dimensional Fr\'echet
manifold of framed curves of fixed length over a simply connected Riemannian
manifold of constant curvature. The paper then considers Hamiltonian systems
generated by the geometric invariants of the curves on the base manifold and
relates them to the equations of mathematical physics.
